mapper.select: select member_id, name, nickname, email, status, created_at, role, last_login_at, suspended_until, coalesce(suspension_count, 0) as suspension_count, coalesce(warning_count, 0) as warning_count, 0 as report_count, 0 as post_count, 0 as comment_count from members order by created_at desc

select p.post_id, p.title, p.content, p.visibility, p.deleted_yn, p.emotion_id, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at, p.member_id, m.name as author_name, m.nickname as author_nickname, 0 as comment_count, 0 as hashtag_count from post_tbl p left join members m on m.member_id = p.member_id order by p.created_at desc limit 500

select p.post_id, p.title, p.content, p.visibility, p.deleted_yn, p.emotion_id, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at, p.member_id, m.name as author_name, m.nickname as author_nickname, coalesce(( select count(*) from comment_tbl c where c.post_id = p.post_id and c.deleted_yn = 'N' ), 0) as comment_count, coalesce(( select count(*) from post_hashtag ph where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), 0) as hashtag_count from post_tbl p left join members m on m.member_id = p.member_id where p.post_id = #{postId} limit 1
mapper.update: update post_tbl set visibility = 'PRIVATE', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set visibility = 'PUBLIC', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set deleted_yn = 'Y', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set deleted_yn = 'N', visibility = 'PUBLIC', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'Y'
mapper.select: select count(*) as total_member_count, coalesce(sum(case when role in ('USER', 'MEMBER') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as normal_member_count, coalesce(sum(case when role in ('ADMIN', 'NORMAL_ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as admin_member_count, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'SUSPENDED' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as suspended_member_count from members
select member_id, name, nickname, email, status, role, created_at, null as action_type, null as action_detail from members order by created_at desc limit 1

select coalesce(target.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target.name, target.nickname, target.email, target.status, target.role, log.created_at, log.action_type, log.action_detail from admin_action_logs log left join members target on target.member_id = log.target_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type = 'SUSPEND' order by log.created_at desc, log.log_id desc limit 1

select log.log_id, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_type, log.target_type, log.target_id, target_member.name as target_name, target_member.nickname as target_nickname, target_member.email as target_email, log.created_at, log.action_detail from admin_action_logs log left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('UPDATE_ADMIN_ROLE', 'SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') order by log.created_at desc, log.log_id desc limit 10

select log.log_id, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_type, log.target_type, log.target_id, target_member.name as target_name, target_member.nickname as target_nickname, target_member.email as target_email, log.created_at, log.action_detail from admin_action_logs log left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('UPDATE_ADMIN_ROLE', 'SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') order by log.created_at desc, log.log_id desc

select member_id, email, name, nickname, phone, email_verified, phone_verified, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, suspended_until, coalesce(suspension_count, 0) as suspension_count, coalesce(warning_count, 0) as warning_count from members where member_id = #{memberId} limit 1

select member_id, name, nickname, email, status, created_at, role, last_login_at, suspended_until, coalesce(suspension_count, 0) as suspension_count, coalesce(warning_count, 0) as warning_count, 0 as report_count, 0 as post_count, 0 as comment_count from members where status = 'ACTIVE' and role in ('USER', 'MEMBER', 'ADMIN', 'NORMAL_ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN') and ( #{keyword} = '' or
name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
) order by created_at desc limit 100
mapper.update: update members set role = #{role}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'ACTIVE' and role in ('USER', 'MEMBER', 'ADMIN', 'NORMAL_ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN')

update members set status = 'SUSPENDED', suspended_until = #{suspendedUntil}, suspension_count = coalesce(suspension_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_at is null
update members set status = 'ACTIVE', suspended_until = null, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'SUSPENDED' and deleted_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into admin_action_logs ( admin_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, created_at, action_detail ) values ( #{adminId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), #{actionDetail} )
mapper.select: select (select count(*) from members) as total_member_count, (select count(*) from members where created_at >= curdate() and created_at < date_add(curdate(), interval 1 day)) as today_new_member_count, (select count(*) from post_tbl where deleted_yn = 'N') as post_count

select p.emotion_id, count(*) as activity_count from post_tbl p where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.emotion_id is not null and ( (#{period} = 'day' and p.created_at >= curdate() and p.created_at < date_add(curdate(), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'week' and p.created_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) and p.created_at < date_add(curdate(), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'month' and p.created_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 month) and p.created_at < date_add(curdate(), interval 1 day)) ) group by p.emotion_id order by p.emotion_id

select * from ( select 'JOINED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, '회원 가입' as activity_detail, m.created_at from members m where m.created_at is not null
union all
select 'DELETED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, '회원 탈퇴' as activity_detail, m.deleted_at as created_at from members m where m.deleted_at is not null
union all
select case when log.action_type = 'SUSPEND' then 'SUSPENDED' else 'RESTORED' end as activity_type, coalesce(target_member.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target_member.name as member_name, target_member.nickname as member_nickname, target_member.email as member_email, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_detail, log.created_at from admin_action_logs log left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') ) recent_activity where created_at is not null order by created_at desc limit 10

select * from ( select 'JOINED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, '회원 가입' as activity_detail, m.created_at from members m where m.created_at is not null
union all
select 'DELETED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, '회원 탈퇴' as activity_detail, m.deleted_at as created_at from members m where m.deleted_at is not null
union all
select case when log.action_type = 'SUSPEND' then 'SUSPENDED' else 'RESTORED' end as activity_type, coalesce(target_member.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target_member.name as member_name, target_member.nickname as member_nickname, target_member.email as member_email, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_detail, log.created_at from admin_action_logs log left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') ) recent_activity where created_at is not null order by created_at desc
select member_id, name, nickname, phone, profile_image_url from members where member_id = #{memberId} limit 1
mapper.update: update members set name = #{name}, nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId}
